summary: Over-ear headphone with a broken headband hinge exposing frayed internal copper wire and visible cracked plastic at the joint.
scene_details: Left side of an over-ear headphone headband and earcup. The plastic hinge/arm at the headband joint is split and jagged; an insulated cable has been severed with copper strands exposed and splayed outward near the break.

defects.label: exposed frayed internal wire
defects.evidence: Black insulated cable with torn outer sheath and multiple copper strands splayed and visible; bright copper color and frayed ends clearly protrude from the headband break.

defects.label: cracked/broken plastic hinge
defects.evidence: Jagged split and separation in the matte black plastic at the headband hinge; visible gaps and torn edges surrounding the exposed cable where the housing has fractured.
